title: Shattered Potato
description: A lighter version of Shattered Reality for potato computers.
body: The modpack used for the Shattered Potato server. This modpack features magic and superpowers. Join your friends and work together or compete to help you survive a somewhat extraordinary world. Features - Backpacks (Traveler's Backpacks) - Magic (RPG Series) - Superpowers (NBC Heroes, Telekinesis) - Much more 3GB+ RAM recommended towards Minecraft # Join the server at ### sr-potato.tw25.net
